dental.subject: Online patient booking for {business_name}
dental.body:
Hi there,

I was looking at your practice online and noticed that your website ({website_url}) might be running on an older platform and doesn't offer a smooth online booking experience for mobile patients.

We recently developed a responsive, premium booking and automatic patient reminder system designed specifically for dental practices. It helps capture more patient bookings and reduces no-shows by up to 30%.

You can see our live booking demo here:
{promo_url}

If you'd be open to seeing how this can be tailored to {business_name}, let me know when is a good time to speak.

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi

derm.subject: Modernizing patient bookings & reminders at {business_name}
derm.body:
Hi there,

I was browsing your clinic's web page ({website_url}) and noticed that it doesn't currently offer real-time patient booking or automatic appointment reminders.

We've built a premium patient scheduler and reminder engine specifically tailored for dermatology clinics. It simplifies scheduling for your staff and automatically texts/emails patients before their appointment to eliminate no-shows.

Have a look at our dermatological system demo here:
{promo_url}

I'd love to chat briefly about how we can integrate this into {business_name}. Do you have 5 minutes for a call sometime this week?

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi

dental_no_booking_ai.subject: AI booking assistant for {business_name}
dental_no_booking_ai.body:
Hi there,

I came across {business_name} online — your website looks great, but I noticed you don't currently have an online booking system or AI assistant for patients.

In today's market, 67% of patients prefer to book appointments online rather than call. We've built an AI-powered booking assistant specifically for dental practices that:

  - Lets patients book 24/7 from your website
  - Sends automatic SMS & email reminders (reduces no-shows by 30%)
  - Answers common patient questions instantly via AI chat
  - Integrates with your existing calendar in under 48 hours

You can see a live demo here:
{promo_url}

Would you be open to a quick 5-minute call to see how it would work for {business_name}?

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi

derm_no_booking_ai.subject: AI appointment booking for {business_name}
derm_no_booking_ai.body:
Hi there,

I found {business_name} online — your clinic's website looks professional, but I noticed there's no online booking or AI assistant for your patients.

Dermatology clinics that add AI-powered booking see on average 40% more appointment requests from their website. Our system:

  - Allows patients to book consultations 24/7 without calling
  - Automatically reminds patients via SMS & email before appointments
  - Uses an AI assistant to answer FAQs and pre-screen new patients
  - Takes less than 48 hours to set up — no tech knowledge needed

See our live dermatology booking demo:
{promo_url}

Would love to show you how this could work for {business_name} — do you have 5 minutes this week?

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi
